channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Investors may be hitting pause on the AI run-up
item.description: Data: Financial Modeling Prep ; Chart: Emily Peck/Axios Investors seem to be hitting pause on the AI run-up. Chip stocks in particular are slumping fr...

item.title: Socialist challenger defeats chair of Congressional Hispanic Caucus
item.description: Rep. Adriano Espaillat lost his primary to democratic socialist Darializa Avila Chevalier on Tuesday.

item.title: Democrats reeling after socialist wins in New York primary
item.description: Two House Democrats, including the Hispanic Caucus chair, lost their primaries on Tuesday night.

item.title: Trump intensifies pressure on NATO allies
item.description: President Trump's recent insults toward European leaders may signal a major shift in trans-Atlantic relations.
